summary: Expenses Router Refactoring (Phase 5) - All tests passed. 7 endpoints extracted from server.py to /app/backend/routers/expenses.py. server.py reduced from 6344 to 6002 lines (-342). Critical stock sync on status=completed working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/expenses - Returns list of expenses
✅ GET /api/expenses?status=pending - Filters by status
✅ GET /api/expenses?category=Alimentation - Filters by category
✅ GET /api/expenses with start_date/end_date - Date range filter works
✅ GET /api/expenses?respect_assigned_week=true - Excludes transferred expenses
✅ POST /api/expenses - Creates expense with status='pending' by default
✅ POST /api/expenses with is_group=true and items[] - Group expense creation works
✅ PUT /api/expenses/{id} status=approved - Sets approved_at timestamp
✅ PUT /api/expenses/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent expense
✅ DELETE /api/expenses/{id} - Removes expense
✅ DELETE /api/expenses/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent expense
✅ PUT /api/expenses/{id}/assign-week - Assigns expense to specific week
✅ POST /api/expenses/assign-week-bulk - Bulk assigns multiple expenses
✅ POST /api/expenses/unassign-week-bulk - Removes week assignment
✅ CRITICAL: PUT status=completed creates stock_movements entree for each item
✅ CRITICAL: PUT status=completed creates stock_purchases with source='caisse'
✅ CRITICAL: PUT status=completed updates matching stock product quantity
✅ Unmatched items create movements with product_id='' (non lié au stock)
✅ No double sync on re-completing already completed expense
✅ Product matching uses multiple levels (exact, prefix, contains)
✅ REGRESSION: GET /api/forecasts/dashboard works (uses db.expenses.find)
✅ REGRESSION: GET /api/expenses/analysis works (in forecasts router)
✅ REGRESSION: GET /api/reports/weekly works (uses db.expenses aggregation)
✅ Simple expense (is_group=false) sync uses description as item
✅ Frontend: Achats tab loads correctly with category filters
✅ Frontend: Expense list displays with items, amounts, status
✅ Frontend: Approve button works - status changes to 'approved'
✅ Frontend: Toast notification shows 'Dépense mise à jour!'
✅ Frontend: Status summary updates (en attente → approuvées)
✅ Frontend: Analysis badges visible (250% trésorerie, 567.6% trésorerie)
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring is clean - 7 endpoints moved to dedicated router with all models (ExpenseItem, ExpenseCreate, ExpenseUpdate)
Stock sync logic preserved correctly: status=completed triggers entree movements + stock_purchases + product qty update
Product matching uses 3 levels: exact match → prefix match → contains match (case insensitive)
Double sync prevention: checks was_completed_before flag before syncing
Router included at line 93 in server.py with other routers for proper routing priority
seed_data_creation: Test expenses created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Expenses router refactoring (Phase 5) fully tested. All 7 endpoints working. Critical stock sync on complete verified. Frontend Achats tab working with approve/complete flows. server.py now 6002 lines.
